name: Jelly Fruit Merge
author: Poki
description: Jelly Fruit Merge is a bouncy and colorful merge game set in a wiggly jelly world! Fruits pop out of pipes, bounce around, and it’s up to you to aim them just right—merge two identical jelly fruits to create a bigger one. Grow your harvest, sell your juicy creations for coins, and keep merging to reach new heights. How big can your jelly fruit get? How to play Jelly Fruit Merge? Click or tap to drop the fruit. Who created Jelly Fruit Merge? Jelly Fruit Merge is created by StarNosed. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Jelly Fruit Merge for free? You can play Jelly Fruit Merge for free on Poki. Can I play Jelly Fruit Merge on mobile devices and desktop? Jelly Fruit Merge can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
